allow: PowerShell(Expand-Archive -Path "$env:TEMP\\ponytail.zip" -DestinationPath "$env:TEMP\\ponytail-extract" -Force; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins" | Out-Null; Copy-Item "$env:TEMP\\ponytail-extract\\ponytail-main" "$env:USERPROFILE\\.claude\\plugins\\ponytail" -Recurse -Force; Write-Output "Done")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path . -Depth 2 -Exclude node_modules -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.html', '.jsx', '.tsx', '.js', '.css', '.json' } | Select-Object FullName | head -50)

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path . -Recurse -Depth 3 -Exclude node_modules -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.html', '.jsx', '.tsx', '.js', '.css', '.json' -and $_.FullName -notmatch 'node_modules' } | Select-Object -First 30 FullName)
